label: Autoregressive / next-step prediction

node.label: Autoregressive / next-step prediction
node.definition: A joint distribution is factorized into a sequence of conditional next-step predictions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Autoregressive / next-step prediction is to connect Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling to downstream capabilities including Autoregressive decoding, Recurrent neural networks, Decoder-only causal transformers.
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling.

dependencies.rationale: Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Self-supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: A joint distribution is factorized into a sequence of conditional next-step predictions.

The role of Autoregressive / next-step prediction is to connect Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling to downstream capabilities including Autoregressive decoding, Recurrent neural networks, Decoder-only causal transformers.

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Generative modeling.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Self-supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Autoregressive / next-step prediction uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
